name: Jingle Bell Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butterscotch chips and peanut butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Place over simmering water, not boiling, until butterscotch melts.
3. Remove from water and stir until blended.
4. Add milk and stir just until blended.
5. Spread mixture into an 8-inch square pan lined with foil.
6. Press chopped nuts onto the surface, if desired.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Cut into 1-inch squares.
